prestazioni: 1KD-FTV (3.0L turbo-diesel) engine: Garrett GTB2260VK turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel, custom 3.5-inch downpipe, and Apexi Power FC standalone ECU mapped for 350 hp at 3,800 rpm with 550 Nm torque at 2,200 rpm on 50/50 E85-diesel blend

KDSS (Kinetic Dynamic Suspension System) deletion with custom-fabricated 4-link rear suspension using HKS Hipermax IV coilovers (front) and Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable dampers (rear), paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)

Dual Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pumps (1,800 bar) with 10mm injector lines, custom 800cc Delphi injectors, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller set to 2.2 bar peak pressure with a 3-port MAC valve for spool control
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-HIACE widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom 3-piece front bumper with integrated LED bar, and carbon fiber side skirts) with custom matte bronze paint (PPG Deltron DBC9800) and 3M 1080 gloss black roof wrap

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (18x9 +30 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear) and custom extended wheel studs (BC Racing 5x114.3 to 5x130 conversion)

Custom rear diffuser with integrated dual 4-inch exhaust outlets (stainless steel 304) and a carbon fiber rear spoiler (Seibon Type-3) mounted on a custom aluminum subframe for reduced weight and improved aerodynamics
